title: teucrium wightii
intro: Teucrium wightii, also known as Nilgiri Tussilago or Nilgiri Eucalyptus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, including camphor and eucalyptol, which have been shown to have antiseptic, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, providing health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving congestion. Teucrium wightii can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of essential oils and topical creams.
